qa_pairs.question: A man is in a remote area of Canada. He chops down four tall, wooden posts and then does nothing with them. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: He was lost in bad weather in northern Saskatchewan and cut down power poles to cut electricity to a community, forcing a helicopter crew to come out and rescue him.

qa_pairs.question: Soon after the 9 storey-high BBC Broadcasting House was built in London, a large loudspeaker was installed on its roof to solve a noise problem for the neighbours. What was it?
qa_pairs.answer: It played a live feed of Big Ben’s chimes so neighbours could still hear them after the new building blocked the sound.

qa_pairs.question: On Wednesday, 6th of March 2019, a decree was enacted banning the residents of a small Bavarian town from shaving or having a haircut for one year. They'll have about nine years off before the same ban is enforced once again. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Because the town was preparing for the once-every-ten-years Oberammergau Passion Play, and the cast needed long hair and beards.

qa_pairs.question: The Hamburg European Open is an annual sports event. Its logo consists of the title in standard lettering, overlaid with a single yellow line of several continuous curves. Why does this logo change every year?
qa_pairs.answer: Because the yellow line shows the trajectory of the championship point from the previous year's tennis tournament.

qa_pairs.question: In 1994, after a 6.7 magnitude earthquake disturbed the residents of Los Angeles, people rang 911 about a large, eerie cloud overhead. Why did operators tell callers there was nothing to worry about?
qa_pairs.answer: The earthquake caused a blackout, and the 'eerie cloud' was just the Milky Way suddenly visible in the dark sky.

qa_pairs.question: From 1988, why did the German company Kinder have to supply a handful of plastic, inedible 'egg men' characters – wearing a red hat and large, white shoes – to every supermarket?
qa_pairs.answer: Early barcode scanners couldn't read barcodes on curved Kinder Eggs, so supermarkets used the flat-footed plastic 'egg men' with a barcode underneath to scan them at checkouts.

qa_pairs.question: When a light aircraft suffered engine failure after takeoff, how were all six people rescued by deploying one parachute?
qa_pairs.answer: The parachute was attached to the entire light aircraft, which was equipped with a whole-airframe parachute system.
